<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete chat message"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v1/spaces/{space_id}/chats/{chat_id}/messages/{message_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes a message from the specified chat.
